name: metroai-uncertainty
description: Measurement uncertainty MCP server with novel reverse uncertainty engineering. GUM-based uncertainty calculation, Monte Carlo (MCM) plus Quasi-Monte Carlo (Sobol) validation, and reverse uncertainty engineering for ISO/IEC 17025 / KOLAS laboratories. v0.6.0 adds TEM/SEM-EDS/AFM/OCD nano-metrology templates, Ed25519 audit signatures, and PROV-O provenance.
author: Yongbeom Kim

tools.name: calculate_uncertainty
tools.description: Calculate measurement uncertainty using GUM (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3). Supports gauge_block, mass, temperature, pressure, dc_voltage, tem_lattice, sem_eds, afm_roughness, and ocd_scatterometry templates. Returns uncertainty budget table with combined uncertainty, expanded uncertainty, coverage factor, and component breakdown.

parameters.template: Calibration field: gauge_block | mass | temperature | pressure | dc_voltage | tem_lattice | sem_eds | afm_roughness | ocd_scatterometry
parameters.std_cert_U: Standard expanded uncertainty from calibration certificate

tools.name: pt_analysis
tools.description: Proficiency Testing analysis per ISO 13528 / ISO 17043. Computes z-score, En number, and zeta-score, with automatic pass/fail judgment.

parameters.assigned_value: Assigned reference value from the PT provider
parameters.U_lab: Your laboratory expanded uncertainty (for En and zeta)

tools.name: reverse_uncertainty
tools.description: Reverse uncertainty engineering. Given target expanded uncertainty U_target, computes the maximum allowed standard uncertainty per component so the combined uncertainty meets the target. Supports equal-allocation and weighted-allocation methods.

parameters.symbols: List of symbol names in the model
parameters.current_values: Map of symbol to current best estimate value
parameters.current_uncertainties: Map of symbol to current standard uncertainty (optional)

0.6.0: Added TEM, SEM-EDS, AFM, OCD nano-metrology templates
Added reverse_uncertainty tool (novel within prior-art search)
Added 6 AI agents backbone (semi-intel, job-scout, kolas-monitor, kolas-audit-predictor, orchestrator, schedule)
Added Ed25519 audit signature and W3C PROV-O provenance
Added Pydantic v2 input validation schemas
Brand colors aligned to v2 spec (Indigo 800 + Cyan 500 + Slate scale)
Removed disability fee assumptions from documentation
